creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #7)
The attribute cacheing tests must require a specific number of GETATTR operations.  Too many looks like an attribute wasn't cached when it should've been.  We could modify them to work specifically when mac_bsdextended is loaded, but it might be an awful lot of special-case code.  I'll try it after I finish Bug 244178.
